info.title: Afframe Public API
info.description:
Public API for the Afframe accounting platform. Authenticate with an API key as a bearer token in the form `affk_live_…`. Sandbox keys (`affk_test_…`) are not issued yet. Errors are returned in a Plaid-shape envelope; rate limits are surfaced via IETF `RateLimit-*` headers.

Service status: [status.afframe.com](https://status.afframe.com) (programmatic at `GET /v1/status`).

tags.name: Meta
tags.description: Service metadata and auth smoke tests

tags.name: Feedback
tags.description: Send bug reports, requests, and questions

tags.name: Structure
tags.description: Application information architecture — modules, pages, and layout archetypes for agent discovery

tags.name: OCR Templates
tags.description: Workspace-shared Brain OCR extraction templates (learned supplier invoice layouts)

bearer.description: API key in the form `affk_live_…`. Send as `Authorization: Bearer <key>`. Sandbox keys (`affk_test_…`) are not issued yet — see the sandbox roadmap in the docs.

Unauthorized.description: API key missing, malformed, revoked, or pointing at a different environment than the host.

Forbidden.description: API key authenticated but lacks the scope required for this operation, or the target resource belongs to a different tenant.

error.message: The API key is not allowed to perform this action.

NotFound.description: The resource referenced by the request URL does not exist (or does not exist within the authenticated tenant — Afframe never leaks cross-tenant existence).

Conflict.description: Idempotency conflict, optimistic-concurrency mismatch, or business-rule conflict.

error.message: Resource is in a state that conflicts with the request.

ValidationError.description: Request body parsed but failed schema validation. The `details` array carries one entry per offending field.

RateLimited.description: Caller exceeded the API-key rate limit. The response carries IETF `RateLimit-*` headers indicating the reset window.

error.message: Too many requests. See the RateLimit-* headers for the reset window.

organizationId.description: The organization the API key is scoped to.

workspaceId.description: The workspace (accountant's office) hosting the org.

principal.description: Identity resolved from the bearer API key. Mirrors the server-side tenancy GUCs (`app.organization_id`, `app.workspace_id`).

PingResponse.description: Confirms the API key authenticated and reveals the resolved tenancy.

legalName.description: Registered legal name, e.g. `Acme Czechia s.r.o.`

fiscalYearStartMonth.description: Month (1–12) on which the org's fiscal year starts. Most CZ entities use `1` (calendar year).

GetOrganizationResponse.description: The organization the API key belongs to. Single-tenant view; future multi-org-per-key tokens will return a list endpoint instead.

code.description: Stable machine-readable error code. SDKs map this to typed error classes; do not switch on `message`. New codes may be added over time (MINOR change) — treat unknown codes by their `error_type` family.

error_type.description: Plaid-shape family (INVALID_REQUEST, UNAUTHORIZED, FORBIDDEN, NOT_FOUND, CONFLICT, VALIDATION, RATE_LIMITED, INTERNAL, …).

display_message.description: Optional end-user-facing message. Present when the cause is safe to surface in a UI; absent for 5xx / unknown errors.

documentation_url.description: Optional deep-link into a hosted error registry. Reserved for future use; the api does not emit this field today.

requestId.description: Echoes the `X-Request-Id` header for support tickets.

details.description: Field-level error breakdown. Reserved for `422 validation_error`; not emitted today.

ApiError.description: Plaid-shape error envelope. Every non-2xx response from `/v1/*` is wrapped in this object.

organizationId.description: The organization the API key is scoped to.

workspaceId.description: The workspace (accountant's office) hosting the org.

ApiPrincipal.description: Identity resolved from the bearer API key. Mirrors the server-side tenancy GUCs (`app.organization_id`, `app.workspace_id`).

legalName.description: Registered legal name, e.g. `Acme Czechia s.r.o.`

fiscalYearStartMonth.description: Month (1–12) on which the org's fiscal year starts. Most CZ entities use `1` (calendar year).

status.description: Overall service status. `operational` = all components healthy; `degraded_performance` = one or more components reporting slow responses; `partial_outage` = a non-critical component is down; `major_outage` = a critical component is down.

Overall service status. `operational` = all components healthy; `degraded_performance` = one or more components reporting slow responses; `partial_outage` = a non-critical component is down; `major_outage` = a critical component is down.

items.description: Per-component health entry. Mirrors the components shown on status.afframe.com.

components.description: Per-component health snapshots. Empty array when the status page is offline and the api falls back to a synthesized response.

statusPageUrl.description: Canonical status page URL. Always `https://status.afframe.com` — included so SDK consumers can deep-link end users to the live page.

fetchedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when this status was fetched.

source.description: `openstatus` when the response came from the live status page; `fallback` when status.afframe.com was unreachable and the api synthesized an operational default.

StatusResponse.description: Service status summary. Programmatic equivalent of status.afframe.com — cache for 30s on the client side.

ServiceStatus.description: Overall service status. `operational` = all components healthy; `degraded_performance` = one or more components reporting slow responses; `partial_outage` = a non-critical component is down; `major_outage` = a critical component is down.

status.description: Overall service status. `operational` = all components healthy; `degraded_performance` = one or more components reporting slow responses; `partial_outage` = a non-critical component is down; `major_outage` = a critical component is down.

ComponentStatus.description: Per-component health entry. Mirrors the components shown on status.afframe.com.

type.description: Feedback category. `bug` = something broken; `request` = new feature ask; `issue` = process / UX / docs problem; `question` = support question that didn't fit the FAQ.

message.description: Free-form feedback text. 1–4000 characters. Markdown allowed but not rendered — the GitHub issue treats this as plain text.
message.example: The /v1/organization endpoint returned a 500 when my API key was created in the last 60 seconds. Retried after a minute and it worked.

email.description: Optional contact email. If provided, support will reply here; otherwise the response is filed without a return path. Already-authenticated keys carry an org contact so this is purely for users who want a direct reply.

page.description: Page the report was filed from.

scope.description: App scope + server-resolved reporter identity. Advisory only — never used for authorization.

surrounding.description: Nearby DOM text for locating the report.

context.description: Optional in-app capture context (page, element, viewport, client). Public callers omit it; the in-app reporter attaches it. Folded into the GitHub issue when present.

CreateFeedbackRequest.description: Partner feedback submission. Idempotency is not enforced — duplicate submissions create duplicate GitHub issues. Clients should rate-limit themselves to one submission per minute.

received.description: Always `true` on a 2xx response. Confirms the api accepted the submission for downstream dispatch (email + GitHub issue).

referenceId.description: Opaque submission reference. Quote this in any follow-up email — it links the support reply back to the GitHub issue.

CreateFeedbackResponse.description: Confirmation that feedback was accepted. Acceptance does NOT guarantee a reply — `question` submissions get one, the others are reviewed without acknowledgement unless an email is provided.

FeedbackType.description: Feedback category. `bug` = something broken; `request` = new feature ask; `issue` = process / UX / docs problem; `question` = support question that didn't fit the FAQ.

key.description: Module route key (first path segment after the org slug). Empty string is the Company index module.

label.description: Module label as shown in the rail.

route.description: Module route relative to the org root. Empty for Company.

icon.description: Rail icon name for the module.

group.description: Sidebar group heading this page sits under, or null when the page is pinned / ungrouped.

label.description: Page label as shown in the sidebar.

route.description: Route relative to the org root (no org slug). Empty string is the module index.

icon.description: Lucide/Phosphor icon name for the page.

archetype.description: Layout archetype, or null when not yet assigned.

purpose.description: One-line description of the page, or null.

label.description: Subpage label as shown in the sidebar.

route.description: Route relative to the org root (no org slug). Prefix with `/{orgSlug}/` to build a URL.

tba.description: Build-status flag. `true` = not-yet-built placeholder (renders a muted TBA chip in the GUI); `false` = shipped.

archetype.description: The layout archetype this page uses, or null when not yet assigned (most pages are placeholders today).

purpose.description: One-line description of the page, or null.

items.description: A leaf subpage under a page (3rd nav level).

subpages.description: Leaf subpages under this page. Empty when the page is a leaf.

items.description: A navigable page within a module (2nd nav level).

pages.description: Flat list of the module's pages, each carrying its `group` heading (null when ungrouped) and any subpages.

items.description: One org rail module and its page tree.

modules.description: The ten org rail modules, in rail order.

GetStructureResponse.description: `GET /v1/structure` — the full org application structure (modules → pages → subpages).

key.description: Content-panel layout archetype. `Table` = dense list (toolbar + grid + status bar); `Blank` = body only, no chrome; `Launchpad` = card grid to subpages; `Dashboard` = KPI tiles + chart cards; `Single` = one record (form panels + line-items).

useWhen.description: When to pick this archetype for a page.

demoRoute.description: Route segment of the dev-only demo page for this archetype (404 in production), or null if none.

items.description: One content-panel layout archetype.

isOpening.description: True for 701 opening-balance postings carried into the period.

side.description: Side of the double entry — MD (DEBIT) or Dal (CREDIT).

amount.description: Signed line amount as a decimal string in the accounting currency (CZK by default). Never a JS number.

rows.description: Journal lines in chronological book order (§13).

amount.description: Rolled-up amount in the presentation unit.

base.description: Unsigned decimal amount as a string.

vat.description: Unsigned decimal amount as a string.

assetThreshold.description: Unsigned decimal amount as a string.

commodityCode.description: §92 kód předmětu plnění for a DOMESTIC reverse-charge supply (1 zlato / 3 nemovitost / 4 stavební-montážní / 5 příloha 5). Only meaningful when jurisdiction = REVERSE_CHARGE; ignored otherwise.

ClassifyEventRequest.description: Economic-event facts to classify into an accounting treatment.

vatMode.description: VAT mode to stamp on the partial record.

vatJurisdiction.description: vat_jurisdiction to stamp on the capture partial — splits an EU supply (ř.20/21 + Souhrnné hlášení) from a domestic §92 PDP (ř.25 + KH A.1).

capitalise.description: Route net to an acquisition account.

deferral.description: Defer the future part to a bridge account.

commodityCode.description: §92 kód předmětu plnění to stamp on the partial record for kontrolní hlášení A.1/B.1; null unless this is a domestic reverse-charge supply.

ClassifyEventResponse.description: The accounting treatment decided from the facts (with reasoning).

id.description: Series id — reference by this in write bodies (seriesId).

items.description: A gapless number series.

NumberSeriesListResponse.description: Number series available for write-body seriesId references.

id.description: Series id — reference by this in write bodies (seriesId).

partyId.description: OUR side (counterparty row); null for internal.

occurredAt.description: Okamžik uskutečnění (§11/1e) — ISO date/datetime in the period.

occurredOn.description: Explicit Czech legal date for period membership. Legacy callers may omit it and the server derives Europe/Prague from occurredAt.

confidence.description: Agent's confidence [0,1]. Writes at/above the server threshold auto-apply; below it are HELD for human review. Required.

rationale.description: Why this write — persisted to the audit trail. Required.
rationale.example: Standard domestic service invoice, VAT 21% deductible.

conversationId.description: Audit-correlation id of the driving agent conversation.

kbRule.description: Agent's claimed KB-rule confidence base. NOT server-verifiable in v1 → degraded to `none` before scoring.

extractionQuality.description: Agent's claimed source extraction quality [0,1]. NOT server-verifiable in v1 → degraded to 0 before scoring.

reconciliation.description: Agent's claimed reconciliation status. NOT server-verifiable in v1 → degraded to `none` before scoring.

vatBaseMatchesNet.description: Verify BONUS claim. NOT server-recomputed → no uplift (false).

rcChecklistPassesOrNA.description: Verify BONUS claim. NOT server-recomputed → no uplift (false).

decree500Confirmed.description: Verify BONUS claim. NOT server-recomputed → no uplift (false).

periodConsistent.description: Verify BONUS claim. NOT server-recomputed → no uplift (false).

bankVsKsSsMatch.description: Verify BONUS claim. NOT server-recomputed → no uplift (false).

capSignals.description: Self-reported Tier-2 CAP signal kinds (e.g. novel_ico, novel_bank_pattern, pdf_low_confidence). These only LOWER trust, so they are honored fail-safe: an asserted cap can hold a write, never release one.

signals.description: Optional evidence envelope the server scores through its own confidence engine (fail-closed: unverifiable claims are degraded, cap signals are honored). Not domain data — stripped before the domain mutation runs.

CreateAccountingEventRequest.description: Create an accounting event (účetní případ). Tenant + responsible user are injected from the API-key principal — never from the body.

status.description: applied = booked; held = queued for human review.

taxPointDate.description: DUZP/DPPD used by VAT outputs. Missing means the legal date remains unresolved.

receivedDate.description: Proven date a received invoice was obtained. Missing means input-VAT eligibility is incomplete.

baseAmount.description: Signed decimal amount as a string.

vatAmount.description: Signed decimal amount as a string.

supplyKind.description: Kind of supply (ZDPH §64/§9). Drives the souhrnné hlášení §102 kód plnění (SERVICES -> 3 service; else -> 0 goods). Optional; absent -> kód 0 (goods/undistinguished).

commodityCode.description: §92 kód předmětu plnění for a DOMESTIC reverse-charge supply: 1 zlato §92b / 3 nemovitost §92d / 4 stavební-montážní §92e / 5 příloha 5 §92c. Drives the kontrolní hlášení A.1/B.1 kód. Optional; only meaningful on a domestic §92 PDP line (absent -> no kód). Distinct from supplyKind.

quantity.description: Signed decimal amount as a string.

unitPrice.description: Unsigned decimal amount as a string.

fxRate.description: Positive decimal amount as a string (nonzero).

vatFxRate.description: Positive decimal amount as a string (nonzero).

confidence.description: Agent's confidence [0,1]. Writes at/above the server threshold auto-apply; below it are HELD for human review. Required.

rationale.description: Why this write — persisted to the audit trail. Required.
rationale.example: Standard domestic service invoice, VAT 21% deductible.

conversationId.description: Audit-correlation id of the driving agent conversation.

kbRule.description: Agent's claimed KB-rule confidence base. NOT server-verifiable in v1 → degraded to `none` before scoring.

extractionQuality.description: Agent's claimed source extraction quality [0,1]. NOT server-verifiable in v1 → degraded to 0 before scoring.

reconciliation.description: Agent's claimed reconciliation status. NOT server-verifiable in v1 → degraded to `none` before scoring.

vatBaseMatchesNet.description: Verify BONUS claim. NOT server-recomputed → no uplift (false).

rcChecklistPassesOrNA.description: Verify BONUS claim. NOT server-recomputed → no uplift (false).

decree500Confirmed.description: Verify BONUS claim. NOT server-recomputed → no uplift (false).

periodConsistent.description: Verify BONUS claim. NOT server-recomputed → no uplift (false).

bankVsKsSsMatch.description: Verify BONUS claim. NOT server-recomputed → no uplift (false).

capSignals.description: Self-reported Tier-2 CAP signal kinds (e.g. novel_ico, novel_bank_pattern, pdf_low_confidence). These only LOWER trust, so they are honored fail-safe: an asserted cap can hold a write, never release one.

signals.description: Optional evidence envelope the server scores through its own confidence engine (fail-closed: unverifiable claims are degraded, cap signals are honored). Not domain data — stripped before the domain mutation runs.

templateId.description: OCR extraction template this capture was derived from (null for structured-export captures). NOT domain data — carried alongside the gate envelope so a future server veto leg can key off the template's confirmation state; it is stripped before the domain mutation runs.

extractionMethod.description: CLIENT-DECLARED discriminator of how this capture was produced: 'structured' (parsed from a Pohoda XML/xlsx/csv export), 'ocr' (vision/OCR extraction from a PDF/image), or 'manual' (hand-entered). NOT domain data. It drives the OCR fail-closed leg: an 'ocr' capture the server cannot tie to a CONFIRMED template is HELD. Optional; only the field's ABSENCE is server-checkable, so a MISSING value is fail-closed to the most conservative case ('ocr') and an agent cannot OMIT its way past the screen. The DECLARED value is not server-verifiable in v1 (a false 'structured'/'manual' label is undetectable), so it is not treated as verified extraction telemetry. Stripped before the domain mutation.

CaptureAccountingDocumentRequest.description: Capture a summary document (doklad) with its lines/partials. Tenant + user injected.

amount.description: Unsigned decimal amount as a string.

taxBase.description: Unsigned decimal amount as a string.

CreateAccountingPostingRequest.description: Post a double-entry (kind=double) or monetary/cash-regime (kind=monetary) posting. Tenant + responsible user injected; opening/correction/generated linkage is not client-settable.

id.description: Held-write id (the tool_call_log row / the reviewId a held write returned). Pass it to POST /v1/accounting/held-writes/{id}/resolve.

toolName.description: Operation the write targeted (createAccountingEvent, captureAccountingDocument, createAccountingPosting).

idempotencyKey.description: The Idempotency-Key the original write carried.

confidence.description: Agent's claimed confidence as a decimal string.

rationale.description: Why the agent wanted this write (audit trail).
rationale.example: Vendor unclear; amount above the always-hold ceiling.

input.description: The stored (redacted) request payload the write would apply.

items.description: A gated write held for human review.

heldWrites.description: The organization's held writes, oldest first.

ListHeldWritesResponse.description: Review queue of gated accounting writes awaiting a human.

id.description: Held-write id (the tool_call_log row / the reviewId a held write returned). Pass it to POST /v1/accounting/held-writes/{id}/resolve.

toolName.description: Operation the write targeted (createAccountingEvent, captureAccountingDocument, createAccountingPosting).

idempotencyKey.description: The Idempotency-Key the original write carried.

confidence.description: Agent's claimed confidence as a decimal string.

rationale.example: Vendor unclear; amount above the always-hold ceiling.

input.description: The stored (redacted) request payload the write would apply.

HeldWriteRow.description: A gated write held for human review.

action.description: approve = execute the stored payload through the original domain path; reject = close the review without any domain write.

note.description: Reviewer note, persisted to the audit trail.
note.example: Checked the invoice PDF — amounts match.

ResolveHeldWriteRequest.description: Resolve a held write. The row id is the idempotency anchor — no Idempotency-Key header is needed; a second resolve returns 409.

result.description: Domain result when approved — same shape as the original endpoint's applied body (eventId / summaryRecordId / postingId…).

CreateInvoiceRequest.description: Capture an invoice (invoice-typed doklad) with its lines/partials. The server derives summary_record_type from `direction`; tenant + user are injected from the principal. Applies (201) or holds for review (202).

status.description: applied = booked; held = queued for human review.

chartId.description: The chart (účtový rozvrh) this account belongs to.

periodId.description: The účetní období the chart is scoped to. Accounts are minted fresh (new ids) each period when the chart is copied forward.

parentId.description: The synthetic account this analytical account rolls up to (§16), or `null` for a synthetic account.

nature.description: Account nature (ASSET | LIABILITY | EQUITY | EXPENSE | REVENUE | OFF_BALANCE).

normalBalance.description: The side that increases the account, or `null` where the sign flips (431, 481, FX accounts).

tracksOpenItems.description: Whether this account is kept on saldokonto (per-open-item tracking). The one operator-chosen stored flag on an account.

class.description: Účtová třída 0–9, generated from the leading digit of `number` (present for every account, including off-balance 8/9).

groupCode.description: Two-digit účtová skupina (generated), or `null` for off-balance classes 8/9.

syntheticCode.description: Synthetic account code (generated from `number`): two digits for a group-level account (e.g. `31`), three otherwise (e.g. `311`).

isSynthetic.description: `true` for a synthetic account, `false` for an analytical one (generated from `parentId`).

specializesDirectiveCode.description: Soft link to the 3-digit směrná-účtová-osnova catalogue code this account specializes, or `null`.

Account.description: A chart-of-accounts entry (účet) within one accounting period.

UpdateAccountRequest.description: Partial edit of an account. At least one editable field must be provided (the api rejects an empty body with 422).

supplierKey.description: Supplier identity the layout belongs to — an IČO or a normalized supplier name.

docKind.description: Document kind this template extracts (e.g. invoice).

locators.description: Field → region map the extractor keys off (opaque Brain-owned JSON).

layoutFingerprint.description: Hash of the field-region geometry, used to re-detect layout drift. Null until first learned.

humanConfirmedAt.description: When a human confirmed this template. NULL = unconfirmed (the trust gate); only a human-actor key may set it via the confirm endpoint.

heldCount.description: How many captures derived from this template were HELD for review. A learning signal; not client-settable.

lastRejectAt.description: When a capture derived from this template was last rejected, or null.

version.description: Refinement version — bumped every time the template is refined (PUT).

learnedAt.description: When the template was first learned.

provenance.description: Opaque Brain-owned provenance blob (how the template was learned).

OcrTemplate.description: A workspace-shared OCR extraction template. Workspace-scoped (FORCE RLS) — shared across every organization in the office.

CreateOcrTemplateRequest.description: Create a new UNCONFIRMED OCR template. `human_confirmed_at` (null) and `held_count` (0) are server-pinned; the workspace comes from the API key.

UpdateOcrTemplateRequest.description: Refine an OCR template. RESETS `human_confirmed_at` to null and bumps `version` — a refined template must be re-confirmed by a human.

get.description: Zero-DB smoke test. Returns the resolved principal — confirms the API key authenticated.

200.description: API key authenticated and the principal resolved.

get.description: Returns the organization the authenticated API key belongs to.
Returns the service health summary. Proxies `status.afframe.com` (OpenStatus) when reachable; otherwise synthesizes an operational fallback. Public — no API key required.

post.description: Submit a bug report, feature request, process issue, or question. The api forwards every submission to `support+feedback@afframe.com` and asks the bot to create or dedup a GitHub issue when issue reporting is configured. Public — no API key required.

get.description: Returns the org application's information architecture — the ten rail modules, each with its full page tree (pages → subpages), build-status, and layout archetype. Start here to discover what the app exposes without driving a browser. Public — no API key required; the structure is tenant-agnostic.
Returns the five content-panel layout archetypes (Table, Blank, Launchpad, Dashboard, Single) with their slot contract — how any page is laid out. Public — no API key required.

Returns the deník — the double-entry postings of the given accounting period in chronological book order (§13), including 701 opening postings. Read-model view; organization-scoped (FORCE RLS) via the API key's own tenant.

schema.description: Accounting period id to read. Resolved within the API key's own organization (FORCE RLS); a period from another tenant returns 404.

parameters.description: Accounting period id to read. Resolved within the API key's own organization (FORCE RLS); a period from another tenant returns 404.
parameters.name: periodId

200.description: The period's journal lines in book order.

get.summary: Get general ledger / trial balance (hlavní kniha)
get.description: Returns per-account opening balance | debit/credit turnover | closing balance for the period, straight from the read-model — the hlavní kniha and obratová předvaha. Organization-scoped (FORCE RLS).

schema.description: Accounting period id to read. Resolved within the API key's own organization (FORCE RLS); a period from another tenant returns 404.

parameters.description: Accounting period id to read. Resolved within the API key's own organization (FORCE RLS); a period from another tenant returns 404.
parameters.name: periodId

get.description: Returns unsettled receivables/payables (open items), optionally filtered by due date and direction. Organization-scoped (FORCE RLS).

schema.description: Only items due strictly before this ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.description: Only items due strictly before this ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD).
parameters.name: dueBefore

schema.description: Restrict to receivables or payables.

parameters.description: Restrict to receivables or payables.
parameters.name: direction

get.description: Returns per-partner open receivable/payable balances (saldokonto). Organization-scoped (FORCE RLS).
Computes the DPH přiznání line values and kontrolní hlášení section totals for the period from the posted facts (§13/§14/§16/§92e/§72-73). Organization-scoped (FORCE RLS).

schema.description: Accounting period id to read. Resolved within the API key's own organization (FORCE RLS); a period from another tenant returns 404.

parameters.description: Accounting period id to read. Resolved within the API key's own organization (FORCE RLS); a period from another tenant returns 404.
parameters.name: periodId

200.description: The period's VAT return + KH totals.

get.description: Computes the DPPO base and tax (§23/1 base, §25 non-deductibles, §34 loss carry-forward, rate, zálohy §38a) for the period. Organization-scoped.

schema.description: Accounting period id to read. Resolved within the API key's own organization (FORCE RLS); a period from another tenant returns 404.

parameters.description: Accounting period id to read. Resolved within the API key's own organization (FORCE RLS); a period from another tenant returns 404.
parameters.name: periodId

200.description: The period's corporate income tax computation.

get.description: EU supplies recap (§102) for the period — per partner + kód plnění. Organization-scoped.

post.description: Pure decision: given raw economic-event facts, returns the accounting treatment (VAT mode, předkontace scenario, capitalisation/deferral, open-item account) with a law-cited reasoning trail. No mutation, no tenant read — safe and repeatable.

get.description: Returns the organization's gapless number series (optionally filtered by entity type). Write bodies reference a series by `seriesId`; this is how an agent discovers those ids. Organization-scoped (FORCE RLS).

schema.description: Filter by entity type.

parameters.description: Filter by entity type.
parameters.name: entityType

post.description: Create an účetní případ. Gated: auto-applies (201) at/above the confidence threshold, otherwise held (202) for human review. Tenant + responsible user injected from the API-key principal.

schema.description: Idempotency key (1–255 chars); reuse on retry.

parameters.description: Idempotency key (1–255 chars); reuse on retry.
parameters.name: idempotency-key

post.description: Capture a doklad with its lines/partials. Gated (201 applied / 202 held). Tenant injected from the principal.

schema.description: Idempotency key (1–255 chars); reuse on retry.

parameters.description: Idempotency key (1–255 chars); reuse on retry.
parameters.name: idempotency-key

post.description: Post a double-entry or monetary posting. Gated (201 applied / 202 held). Tenant + responsible user injected; opening/correction/generated linkage is not client-settable.

schema.description: Idempotency key (1–255 chars); reuse on retry.

parameters.description: Idempotency key (1–255 chars); reuse on retry.
parameters.name: idempotency-key

get.description: Returns the organization's review queue — gated writes that were HELD (below the confidence threshold or above the always-hold amount) and await a human decision, oldest first. Organization-scoped (FORCE RLS).

post.description: Approve or reject a held write. Approve executes the stored payload through the same domain path the original endpoint would have used, with the approver as the responsible user; reject closes the review with no domain write. The row id is the idempotency anchor — no Idempotency-Key header; a second resolve returns 409.

schema.description: Held-write id (the reviewId returned by the held write). Resolved within the API key's own organization (FORCE RLS).

parameters.description: Held-write id (the reviewId returned by the held write). Resolved within the API key's own organization (FORCE RLS).
parameters.name: id

get.description: Returns the organization's invoices — `summary_record` rows of type RECEIVED_INVOICE (faktura přijatá) or ISSUED_INVOICE (faktura vydaná) — with rolled-up accounting-currency totals. Organization-scoped (FORCE RLS). Optionally filter by `direction` and `periodId`. An invoice is a voucher header, not a posting; use `GET /v1/accounting/periods/{id}/journal` for the journal bookings.

schema.description: Restrict to received or issued invoices.

parameters.description: Restrict to received or issued invoices.
parameters.name: direction

schema.description: Restrict to one účetní období.

parameters.description: Restrict to one účetní období.
parameters.name: periodId

post.description:
Captures an invoice (invoice-typed doklad) with its lines/partials. The server pins summary_record_type from `direction` (received → RECEIVED_INVOICE, issued → ISSUED_INVOICE); tenant + responsible user are injected from the API-key principal — never the body. Each line references a pre-existing accounting event (`eventId`) — create those via `POST /v1/accounting/events` first; `seriesId` is a DOCUMENT number series (discover via `GET /v1/accounting/number-series`).

Distinct from `POST /v1/accounting/documents`, which captures a doklad of ANY summary_record_type; this operation is invoice-only. Runs through the same server safety gate: applies (201) or holds for human review (202) below the confidence threshold or above the always-hold amount. Requires the `accounting:write` scope and an `Idempotency-Key` header.

schema.description: Idempotency key (1–255 chars); reuse on retry.

parameters.description: Idempotency key (1–255 chars); reuse on retry.
parameters.name: idempotency-key

201.description: The invoice was captured and booked.

202.description: The invoice was held for human review.

get.description: Returns a single invoice with its individual-record lines and partial-record money decomposition, organization-scoped (FORCE RLS). Returns 404 when the invoice is not visible to the authenticated tenant.

schema.description: Opaque invoice identifier (UUID).

parameters.description: Opaque invoice identifier (UUID).
parameters.name: invoiceId

200.description: The requested invoice with its lines.

get.description: Returns the organization's chart-of-accounts entries (účtový rozvrh), organization-scoped (FORCE RLS). Optionally filter by účetní období (`periodId`) and synthetic/analytical shape (`isSynthetic`). The chart exists only for DOUBLE_ENTRY periods — SINGLE_ENTRY / TAX_RECORDS orgs keep no chart and return an empty list.

schema.description: Restrict to one účetní období. Omit to list every period's accounts the tenant can see.

parameters.description: Restrict to one účetní období. Omit to list every period's accounts the tenant can see.
parameters.name: periodId

schema.description: Filter to synthetic (`true`) or analytical (`false`) accounts only.

parameters.description: Filter to synthetic (`true`) or analytical (`false`) accounts only.
parameters.name: isSynthetic

200.description: The chart-of-accounts entries matching the filters.

get.description: Returns a single chart-of-accounts entry by id, organization-scoped (FORCE RLS). Returns 404 when the account does not exist within the authenticated tenant — cross-tenant existence is never leaked.

schema.description: Opaque account identifier (UUID).

parameters.description: Opaque account identifier (UUID).
parameters.name: accountId

patch.description: Partially edits an account. Only the two operator-editable columns are accepted — `name` and `tracksOpenItems` (saldokonto). Structural and generated columns (number, nature, normalBalance, parent, the generated class/group/synthetic levels) are immutable through this surface: changing them retroactively reclassifies posted history. Requires the `accounting:write` scope. Returns 404 when the account is not visible to the authenticated tenant.

schema.description: Opaque account identifier (UUID).

parameters.description: Opaque account identifier (UUID).
parameters.name: accountId

get.description: Returns the workspace's OCR extraction templates — the Brain's learned supplier invoice layouts, WORKSPACE-scoped (FORCE RLS) and shared across every organization in the accountant's office. Optionally filter by `supplierKey` and `docKind`. Both human and agent keys may read.

schema.description: Filter to one supplier (IČO or normalized name).

parameters.description: Filter to one supplier (IČO or normalized name).
parameters.name: supplierKey

schema.description: Filter to one document kind.

parameters.description: Filter to one document kind.
parameters.name: docKind

200.description: The workspace's OCR templates matching the filters.

post.description: Creates a NEW, UNCONFIRMED template in the caller's workspace. The server pins `humanConfirmedAt` to null and `heldCount` to 0 — a fresh template is never auto-trusted; a human must confirm it via `POST /v1/ocr-templates/{id}/confirm`. Agent keys may create. Requires the `accounting:write` scope. The workspace comes from the API key.

put.description: Refines an existing template (replacing its learned fields). A refine RE-OPENS the trust gate: the server resets `humanConfirmedAt` to null and bumps `version`, so a refined template must be re-confirmed by a human. Identity (`supplierKey` / `docKind`) is immutable through this surface. Agent keys may refine. Requires the `accounting:write` scope. Returns 404 when the template is not visible to the caller's workspace.

schema.description: OCR template id, resolved within the API key's workspace.

parameters.description: OCR template id, resolved within the API key's workspace.
parameters.name: id

post.description: Marks a template as human-confirmed (sets `humanConfirmedAt` to now). HUMAN-ACTOR ONLY: an agent-actor key is rejected with 403 — confirmation is the trust boundary that a human, not the Brain, must cross. Returns 404 when the template is not visible to the caller's workspace.

schema.description: OCR template id, resolved within the API key's workspace.

parameters.description: OCR template id, resolved within the API key's workspace.
parameters.name: id
